input.command:
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"
echo "=== launcher.log tail (last 15) ==="
tail -15 "$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log" 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== LaunchCat.app host running? ==="
ps aux | grep -i 'LaunchCat.app/Contents/MacOS' | grep -v grep || echo "(LaunchCat GUI not running)"
echo
echo "=== any launcher.exe (GUI login client) running? ==="
ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe|cityofheroes' | grep -v grep || echo "(no launcher.exe / cityofheroes.exe)"
echo
echo "=== process.json ==="
cat "$COH/settings/launcher/process.json" 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== crash dumps? ==="
ls -lat ~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'city|wine' | head -5 || echo "(none)"
find "$COH" -iname '*crash*' -newermt '2026-07-13 00:00' 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Check for active login before touching orphaned desktop
